_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Limbo
author: xgigabaitx@gmail.com
description: LOOHP/Limbo — lightweight, standalone limbo server. Auto-update from Maven repository. Supports ViaLimbo for version compatibility.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
apk add --no-cache curl
mkdir -p /mnt/server && cd /mnt/server || exit 1
curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tensacraft/eggs/main/limbo/startup.sh" -o startup.sh || { echo 'Failed to download startup.sh'; exit 1; }
chmod +x startup.sh
curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LOOHP/Limbo/master/src/main/resources/server.properties" -o server.properties || true
echo 'Done!'

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Update Limbo to the latest version

variables.name: Limbo Version
variables.description: Limbo version or 'latest' for automatic updates

variables.name: ViaLimbo
variables.description: Install and auto-update ViaLimbo plugin (ViaVersion support)

variables.name: ViaLimbo Version
variables.description: ViaLimbo version or 'latest' for automatic updates

variables.name: Forwarding Secret
variables.description: Velocity forwarding secret written to server.properties (forwarding-secrets)
